ddls:
CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Name of the head of the department */,
  "department_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the department */,
  "department_email" TEXT /* Email address of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "designations" (
  "designation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each designation */,
  "designation_name" TEXT /* Name of the designation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the designation */,
  "responsibilities" TEXT /* Responsibilities associated with the designation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("designation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payroll" (
  "payroll_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payroll entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "payroll_date" TEXT /* Date of the payroll */,
  "gross_salary" INTEGER /* Gross salary for the payroll period */,
  "medical_allowance" INTEGER /* Medical allowance for the payroll period */,
  "conveyance_allowance" INTEGER /* Conveyance allowance for the payroll period */,
  "net_salary" INTEGER /* Net salary for the payroll period */,
  " Provident_fund_contribution" INTEGER /*  Provident fund contribution for the payroll period */,
  "ESI_contribution" INTEGER /* ESI contribution for the payroll period */,
  "income_tax_deduction" INTEGER /* Income tax deduction for the payroll period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payroll_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance review */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance review */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the employee (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the reviewer */,
  "goals" TEXT /* Goals set for the employee */,
  "areas_for_improvement" TEXT /* Areas identified for improvement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., HR, Manager, Admin) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee record being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leave_management" (
  "leave_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leave entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "leave_type" TEXT /* Type of leave (e.g., annual, sick, maternity) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the leave */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the leave */,
  "number_of_days" INTEGER /* Number of days of leave */,
  "leave_status" TEXT /* Status of the leave (e.g., approved, rejected, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leave_id")
)
